title: senecio peruensis
intro: Senecio peruensis, also known as Andean wormseed, is a perennial herb native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Senecio peruensis include relief from symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to help eliminate intestinal worms. Senecio peruensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
